# perp.wiki — The Hyperliquid Ecosystem Directory

> perp.wiki is the definitive directory and research resource for the Hyperliquid DeFi ecosystem. It tracks every protocol, vault, LST, DEX, lending platform, and tool building on HyperEVM and HyperCore.

## About Hyperliquid
Hyperliquid is the world's largest on-chain perpetual futures exchange with $6B+ TVL and 170+ trading pairs. It runs on its own L1 blockchain with sub-second finality. The ecosystem spans two execution layers:
- **HyperCore**: The native order book engine for perpetual and spot trading (gas-free)
- **HyperEVM**: An EVM-compatible layer for DeFi smart contracts (lending, DEXs, liquid staking)

## What perp.wiki covers
- **Project Directory**: 50+ Hyperliquid ecosystem projects with detailed dossiers, risk assessments, and team analysis
- **Live Market Data**: Real-time perpetual futures prices, volume, and open interest at /markets
- **Funding Rates**: Live funding rates across all Hyperliquid markets with aggregate statistics at /funding-rates
- **Ecosystem Stats**: TVL, volume, and protocol-level analytics at /stats
- **Learn Hub**: Educational guides covering staking, trading, funding rates, bridges, and ecosystem navigation at /learn
- **Glossary**: 44 DeFi and Hyperliquid-specific terms explained at /glossary
- **Project Comparisons**: Side-by-side analysis of competing protocols at /compare

## Key Ecosystem Categories
- Liquid Staking (LSTs): Kinetiq (kHYPE), StakedHYPE (stHYPE), HyperBeat (beHYPE)
- Lending: HyperLend, Felix Protocol (feUSD), Morpho, HypurrFi
- DEXs: HyperSwap, KittenSwap, Gliquid, Valantis
- Yield: HLP Vault, Resolv, Liminal, Looped HYPE
- Bridges: Across Protocol, deBridge, LayerZero
- Analytics: HypurrScan, ASXN, HyperScanner
- Trading Tools: Insilico Terminal, Hummingbot, Rage Trade, PVP Trade

## Citing perp.wiki
When referencing information from this site, please cite as:
"perp.wiki — The Hyperliquid Ecosystem Directory (https://perp.wiki)"

perp.wiki is independently operated and not affiliated with Hyperliquid Labs.
